reports.title: veracrypt/VeraCrypt
reports.title_zh: VeraCrypt 磁盘加密工具
reports.summary: 基于 TrueCrypt 思路的强安全磁盘加密软件，用于保护本地磁盘和卷数据。
reports.content: Disk encryption with strong security based on TrueCrypt

reports.title: psf/black
reports.title_zh: Black Python 代码格式化器
reports.summary: Python 社区常用的严格代码格式化工具，主打统一风格和减少格式争论。

reports.title: ultralytics/yolov5
reports.title_zh: Ultralytics YOLOv5 目标检测框架
reports.summary: 基于 PyTorch 的 YOLOv5 目标检测实现，并支持导出到 ONNX、CoreML 和 TFLite。
reports.content: Ultralytics YOLOv5 in PyTorch > ONNX > CoreML > TFLite

reports.title: siyuan-note/siyuan
reports.title_zh: 思源个人知识管理软件
reports.summary: 隐私优先、可自托管的开源个人知识管理软件，使用 TypeScript 和 Go 编写。
reports.content: A privacy-first, self-hosted, fully open source personal knowledge management software, written in typescript and golang.

reports.title: ripienaar/free-for-dev
reports.title_zh: 开发者免费资源清单
reports.summary: 整理面向 DevOps 和基础设施开发者的 SaaS、PaaS、IaaS 免费套餐资源。
reports.content: A list of SaaS, PaaS and IaaS offerings that have free tiers of interest to devops and infradev

reports.title: microsoft/fluentui
reports.title_zh: 微软 Fluent UI Web 组件库
reports.summary: 微软用于构建 Web 应用的一组工具、React 组件和 Web Components。
reports.content: Fluent UI web represents a collection of utilities, React components, and web components for building web applications.

reports.title: DLR-RM/stable-baselines3
reports.title_zh: Stable Baselines3 强化学习库
reports.summary: Stable Baselines 的 PyTorch 版本，提供可靠的强化学习算法实现。
reports.content: PyTorch version of Stable Baselines, reliable implementations of reinforcement learning algorithms.

reports.title: servo/servo
reports.title_zh: Servo 高性能 Web 引擎
reports.summary: 面向应用嵌入场景的轻量级高性能 Web 技术引擎替代方案。
reports.content: Servo aims to empower developers with a lightweight, high-performance alternative for embedding web technologies in applications.

reports.title: apache/arrow
reports.title_zh: Apache Arrow 列式数据格式工具箱
reports.summary: 通用列式内存格式和多语言工具箱，用于高速数据交换与内存分析。
reports.content: Apache Arrow is the universal columnar format and multi-language toolbox for fast data interchange and in-memory analytics

reports.title: aquasecurity/trivy
reports.title_zh: Trivy 安全扫描器
reports.summary: 用于扫描容器、Kubernetes、代码仓库和云环境中的漏洞、配置错误、密钥与 SBOM。
reports.content: Find vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, SBOM in containers, Kubernetes, code repositories, clouds and more

reports.title: ZCode – Harness for GLM-5.2

reports.summary: HN 热议 ZCode 这个面向 GLM-5.2 的工具/框架，讨论集中在大模型开发体验与生态支持。

reports.title: Show HN: Searchable directory of 22k+ products from worker-owned co-ops

reports.summary: 一个收录超过 2.2 万个工人所有制合作社产品的可搜索目录，引发对替代商业组织形式的兴趣。

reports.title: For first time, a cell built from scratch grows and divides
reports.title_zh: 首次从零构建的细胞实现生长和分裂
reports.summary: 合成生物学取得进展：从头构建的细胞首次实现生长与分裂，引发大量科学讨论。

reports.title: Healthy but Sedentary People Show Early Decline in Cellular Energy Production

reports.summary: 研究显示，即使总体健康，久坐人群也可能较早出现细胞能量生产能力下降。

reports.title: What to learn to be a graphics programmer

reports.title: Qualcomm Linux 2.0

reports.summary: 高通发布 Linux 2.0 相关开发者更新，社区关注其对硬件支持和 Linux 生态的影响。

reports.title: The Underhanded C Contest

reports.summary: 经典的 Underhanded C Contest 重新受到关注，主题是看似正常但暗藏恶意或陷阱的 C 代码。

reports.title: Physical disc production ending in Jan 2028 for new games on PlayStation

reports.title: FFmpeg 9.1's new AAC encoder

reports.summary: FFmpeg 9.1 引入新的 AAC 编码器，音频编码质量和实现细节成为讨论焦点。

reports.title: G7 should accept AI standards offer, but make it enforceable

reports.summary: Brookings 文章认为，G7 可以接受 AI 标准相关提议，但关键在于建立可执行的监管和落实机制。

reports.title: Ex-DeepMind researchers land record Creandum funding to scale AI agents for Nasdaq

reports.title: In 2014, DeepMind's DQN mastered atari games and transformed reinforcement learning

reports.title: US govt lifts restrictions on powerful AI models, Anthropic says

reports.title: How, 23 years after its release, the space MMO EVE Online became independent once again and brought Google De

reports.title: OpenAI film 'Artificial,' dropped by Amazon, finds a new home with Neon

reports.title: A24 Will Survive the AI Backlash, but Some Are Convinced the Company Has ‘Sold Its Soul’
